description: API & YOU is a French digital marketing, e-commerce, data, and AI agency serving hospitality, food, tourism, and related sectors. It also develops the Suite Consoles platform, including SecretBox for gift-box and voucher commerce.
summary: api-and-you.com exposes a public MCP server: SecretBox at https://mcp.api-and-you.com/mcp; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
